primary_hypothesis: A common forward-model and SNR convention separates detectable, boundary-detectable, and non-detectable regions for six oceanic processes without merging unlike instrument classes.

published_case_gate.exception_policy: A larger difference is allowed only with a quantified attribution to domain, resolution, Green function, geometry, or preprocessing; it is not a passing reproduction.

decision_rule.success: All correctness and case gates pass and every required process is classified over frequency, distance, instrument, and observation duration with uncertainty.
decision_rule.negative_result: A process remaining non-detectable throughout its realistic prior is retained and reported as a physical feasibility boundary.
decision_rule.failure: Unclosed validation errors, omitted required processes, or a detectability claim based only on amplitude/noise curve intersection without bandwidth and duration.
